'''Ruto Graven''' was the [[Assistant Minister of Internal Affairs]] for [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]].

==Biography==
He was arrested by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] troops in the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. Eventually, he escaped together with a group of captured agents of the [[Naboo Underground]]. He was confident that the situation would be solved diplomatically by the Queen who had escaped to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
